_comment: Benchmark sweep configuration for the art_simple ART reconstruction example.
Each scenario maps to one BenchmarkScenario object in metrics_collector.py.
app_args positional order (matches prompt.txt execution example):
- Varying process counts (2, 4, 8) to measure MPI scaling
- Varying iteration counts (small / medium / large workload)
- Early vs. late failure injection (injection_delay variation)
Set DATA_PATH env var to override the default HDF5 input path.

scenarios._comment: --- Baseline: 4 procs, small workload, no failure ---
scenarios.name: 4procs-small-no-failure

scenarios._comment: --- Resilience: 4 procs, small workload, single failure injected early ---
scenarios.name: 4procs-small-failure-early

scenarios._comment: --- Resilience: 4 procs, small workload, single failure injected late ---
scenarios.name: 4procs-small-failure-late

scenarios._comment: --- Baseline: 4 procs, medium workload (more iterations), no failure ---
scenarios.name: 4procs-medium-no-failure

scenarios._comment: --- Resilience: 4 procs, medium workload, single failure ---
scenarios.name: 4procs-medium-failure

scenarios._comment: --- Scaling: 2 procs, medium workload, no failure ---
scenarios.name: 2procs-medium-no-failure

scenarios._comment: --- Scaling: 2 procs, medium workload, single failure ---
scenarios.name: 2procs-medium-failure

scenarios._comment: --- Scaling: 8 procs, medium workload, no failure ---
scenarios.name: 8procs-medium-no-failure

scenarios._comment: --- Scaling: 8 procs, medium workload, single failure ---
scenarios.name: 8procs-medium-failure

scenarios._comment: --- Large workload: 4 procs, many iterations, no failure ---
scenarios.name: 4procs-large-no-failure

scenarios._comment: --- Large workload: 4 procs, many iterations, single failure ---
scenarios.name: 4procs-large-failure
